text_block_list.text:
Seiun Sky and I are just on our way home when we
come across the white cat again.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Hey there. Taking a walk, Frosty?

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: ...Mew.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Huh?! Trainer, he just invited us to join in on his
walk!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's 'cause we've been spending so much time
together. ♪ Well, I'm not letting this chance go
to waste. Let's go!
And so, we join Frosty on a walk. However...

I find myself caught off guard by how far cats
seem to walk.
choice_data_list: This guy's on quite the stroll...
This guy's on quite the stroll...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
We're patrolling Frosty's territory. That's real
important work for a cat, you know.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I myself have learned quite a lot from my strolls
with Frosty.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I've had an honest adoration for cats ever since I
was very little.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Whenever I went fishing with Gramps, there'd be
cats around, all lounging about in the sun.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
They live free and do whatever the heck they
want. So I figured that's what being a cat was all
about.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But the truth is, they don't have it that easy
either.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
For starters, you need your own territory. And on
top of that, you need to get food, water, and a
warm place to sleep.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Course, you end up fighting other cats for those
things. That's why you gotta patrol every day,
and keep it all safe.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
At any rate, only the toughest, smartest cats
make it. Right, Frosty?

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: Meow.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Actually, Frosty taught me this stuff while we
were on our walks together. He's been like my
teacher.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's where the name comes from, by the
way. It's not just 'cause he's a white cat, it's 'cause
he taught me the importance of staying frosty. I
call him that 'cause I'm grateful.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Well, I made up the stuff about the name.

When it seems like we're almost at the end of
Frosty's patrol...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Uh oh, this could be bad.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
It's a turf war. Look, those cats came from over
that way.

Three cats approach Frosty and, with hackles
fully raised, start threatening him.

text_block_list.name: Three Cats
text_block_list.text: Hissss!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Three against one, huh...

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: ...MRAOOW!

Intimidated by Frosty's threat, two of the three
cats immediately run off with their tails between
their legs!

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
The thing is, Frosty used to be so tough that
other cats would run off before a squabble even
started.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But now they've got their eyes on his turf. See?
That one's still ready to go.

text_block_list.name: Young Cat
text_block_list.text: Hisss!

text_block_list.name: White Cat
text_block_list.text: Mraaaw!

After a lengthy stare-down... Frosty turns away
from the other cat and bolts away.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Looks like Frosty lost...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text: Looks like Frosty lost...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
He's definitely gotten weaker. All cats age,
doesn't matter how tough they are.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
And sooner or later they get upstaged by some
young hotshot. That's just the way things go.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
I wish there were a way to reward Frosty for
working so hard for so long...

Seiun Sky mumbles sadly to herself as she looks
off in the direction Frosty ran.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
At least things got settled without any fighting.
I'm glad Frosty didn't get hurt.

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
But... I guess it's only a matter of time. Frosty's
getting to that age now, so I...

text_block_list.name: Seiun Sky
text_block_list.text:
Oh, it's nothing... Welp, it's getting dark. Let's
head back.

It doesn't seem like nothing, but I let it go, and
we return to the academy.
